capability.summary: Draft a BMAD capability pack for Google Apps Script docs evidence through Context7.

acceptanceCriteria.statement: Forge emits deterministic Google Apps Script Context7 Docs capability-pack draft artifacts from local evidence.
Generated capability request verifies offline without live Context7, MCP config, network, or Apps Script runtime access.
Generated artifacts preserve apps-script-guide, apps-script-reference, and apps-script-samples source mappings.
